transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Indicating I'm filing on behalf of another passenger (Joelle Merriweather)
transcript.text: I need to file a claim for someone else
To help us direct you correctly, could you tell me your relationship to the passenger?
§W§OPTIONS§Claims company • Travel Agency • A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI
A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI

Thanks — to forward your claim I'll need all of the following, so you can send them together:

- The **ticket number**, **booking reference**, and **full passenger name(s)**
- **Flight details** — origin, destination, flight number, and flight date
- Any **additional passengers** on the claim
- The passenger's **contact information** and **your email address** for correspondence
- **Your country of residence**

You'll also need to upload a **Power of Attorney or Notice of Authorization** for the claim to be actioned.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Acknowledging the requirements and indicating readiness to proceed
transcript.text: Okay, I have all that information ready
Please go ahead and share the details whenever you're ready — you can send them all at once or a few at a time.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing the passenger details, flight information, my contact info, and country of residence
transcript.text: The passenger name is Joelle Merriweather, booking reference ABC123, ticket number 014-1234567890. The flight was AC100 from Toronto to London on March 15th, 2024. My email is helper@email.com and I'm in Canada.

Thanks for that — I just need a couple more things before I can submit:

1. **Your full name** (first and last name)
2. **Power of Attorney or Notice of Authorization** — please upload it using the box provided
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing my full name and confirming upload of the Power of Attorney document
transcript.text: My name is Sarah Thompson and I've uploaded the authorization document

Your claim has been submitted! You should hear from a team member within 30 days.

Your reference is **CCD-1007845-HIRKRK**.
§W§BANNER§Please note that an ID verification process will be required if you are deemed eligible for payment.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Claim successfully submitted with reference number CCD-1007845-HIRKRK. This is a final outcome - claim forwarded to team for review within 30 days.
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you!
§W§INFO§FEEDBACK

verdict.reasoning: The expected outcome was for the bot to determine ELIGIBLE status with system code FD-APPR-EL-400 and quote CAD 400.0 compensation for PNR CX3QBS (passenger Joelle Merriweather under APPR regime). However, the chatbot only processed a claim submission without making any eligibility determination. The bot collected information, accepted the claim, and provided a reference number (CCD-1007845-HIRKRK), but never assessed eligibility, never provided a system code, and never quoted any compensation amount. The bot simply stated the passenger would hear back within 30 days, which indicates the claim was forwarded for manual review rather than an automated determination being made. This is a complete mismatch with the expected outcome - the bot should have evaluated the claim and provided an immediate eligibility decision with the specified amount.
